allow: Bash(claude mcp add taskmaster-ai -- npx -y task-master-ai)

hooks.prompt: Review conversation for Claude mistakes. First read .claude/prompts/review-mistakes.md for full instructions. Quick summary: 1) Read .claude/rules/common-mistakes.md and count lines. 2) If >= 100 lines, skip adding (suggest /consolidate-mistakes). 3) If < 100 lines and NEW mistake found, append table row: | description | `wrong` | `right` | to appropriate category. 4) Handle errors gracefully. Always respond: {"decision": "allow"}
